tasks.label: Run Django server for manual check
args:
$env:DJANGO_SETTINGS_MODULE='crucero_restaurant.settings'; python - << 'PY'
import os
os.environ.setdefault('DJANGO_SETTINGS_MODULE','crucero_restaurant.settings')
from django.core.management import call_command
call_command('check')
print('Django check OK')
PY

tasks.label: Run Django check
args: $env:DJANGO_SETTINGS_MODULE='crucero_restaurant.settings'; python -c "import os; os.environ.setdefault('DJANGO_SETTINGS_MODULE','crucero_restaurant.settings'); from django.core.management import call_command; call_command('check'); print('Django check OK')"

tasks.label: Run Django check
tasks.command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$env:DJANGO_SETTINGS_MODULE='crucero_restaurant.settings'; python -c \"import os; os.environ.setdefault('DJANGO_SETTINGS_MODULE','crucero_restaurant.settings'); from django.core.management import call_command; call_command('check'); print('Django check OK')\""
